description: Direct instantiation of concrete class Beeswarm
reasoning: The _CategoricalPlotter class directly instantiates the concrete class 'Beeswarm' within the 'plot_swarms' method. This creates a hard dependency on the implementation details of the Beeswarm class, violating the Dependency Inversion Principle, which dictates that high-level modules should depend on abstractions rather than concrete implementations.
